signal_cue_instantly.param: table[ $id = 'accountThreshold', $start = global.$WarehouseFleets.$accountThreshold, $col = 2, $text = table[$text=''], $min = 0, $max = 100, $suffix = 'M', $default = 1, $mouseOverText = 'WarehouseFleet ships will only buy from NPC stations if the player account will remain above this threshold', $onSliderCellConfirm = OnUpdateValue ]

table[ $id = 'transferToPlayer', $checked = global.$WarehouseFleets.$transferToPlayer, $col = 2, $width = 'Helper.standardButtonHeight', $height = 'Helper.standardButtonHeight', $default = false, $mouseOverText = 'Enable auto-transfer of excess credits from warehouse accounts to player account', $onClick = OnUpdateCheckbox ]

table[ $id = 'failedOrderHandling', $col = 2, $options = [ table[$text='Refund (Default)', $value=1], table[$text='Teleport', $value=2], table[$text='Destroy', $value=3], table[$text='Return', $value=4], table[$text='Drop', $value=5] ], $startOption = global.$WarehouseFleets.$failedOrderHandling, $mouseOverText = 'Trade orders may fail and leave cargo unhandled in the ships. Select the method of cargo auto-handling below:

' + 'Refund: Wares are refunded back to the player based on their average prices. Shows up as a transfer on the transaction log

' + 'Teleport: wares are teleported to the warehouse

'+ 'Destroy: wares are destroyed

'+ 'Return: wares are returned to the warehouse through trade orders

'+ 'Drop: wares are dropped', $onDropDownConfirmed = OnUpdateDropdown ]

table[ $id = 'waitInDockS', $checked = global.$WarehouseFleets.$waitInDockS, $col = 2, $width = 'Helper.standardButtonHeight', $height = 'Helper.standardButtonHeight', $default = false, $mouseOverText = 'S-sized ships should dock at their home warehouse while waiting for new delivery jobs', $onClick = OnUpdateCheckbox ]

table[ $id = 'waitInDockM', $checked = global.$WarehouseFleets.$waitInDockM, $col = 2, $width = 'Helper.standardButtonHeight', $height = 'Helper.standardButtonHeight', $default = false, $mouseOverText = 'M-sized ships should dock at their home warehouse while waiting for new delivery jobs', $onClick = OnUpdateCheckbox ]

table[ $id = 'waitInDockL', $checked = global.$WarehouseFleets.$waitInDockL, $col = 2, $width = 'Helper.standardButtonHeight', $height = 'Helper.standardButtonHeight', $default = false, $mouseOverText = 'L-sized ships should dock at their home warehouse while waiting for new delivery jobs', $onClick = OnUpdateCheckbox ]
